# MODEL: Two-state timedCGS for TCTL AU vs EU regression
#
# PURPOSE: s0 can self-loop or move to s1; s1 self-loops only; p holds at s1.
#          E[!p U p] = {s0, s1}  (s0 has path s0->s1 reaching p)
#          A[!p U p] = {s1}      (s0 can loop forever without reaching p)
#
# LOGIC: TCTL

Transition
* a
0 *
Name_State
s0 s1
Initial_State
s0
Atomic_propositions
p
Labelling
0
1
Number_of_agents
1
Clocks
x
Clock_constraints
x<=1 x<=1
x<=1 x<=1
Invariants
x<=2
x<=2
